creator: doctorwhoguy@gmail.com
text:
Someone on the current mailing list was also saying that this is a devd issue. Here's my current rc.conf:

clear_tmp_enable="YES"
syslogd_flags="-ss"
sendmail_enable="NONE"

hostname="xps400"

dbus_enable="YES"
hald_enable="YES"
moused_enable="YES"
ntpdate_enable="YES"
ntpd_enable="YES"
powerd_enable="YES"
sddm_enable="YES"
sshd_enable="YES"
webcamd_enable="YES"

# Set dumpdev to "AUTO" to enable crash dumps, "NO" to disable
dumpdev="AUTO"

wlans_run0="wlan0"
ifconfig_wlan0="DHCP WPA"
